three_receipt_doctrine.SAC_status: THREE-RECEIPT COMPLETE — SAC canon lock authorized

CL-003.OV: provisional — shorten; process chain not law sentence
CL-003.OV_short_form: ANUBIS may gate authority only after telemetry, regime, evidence, burden, force, and stuck-state review are complete.

CL-006.CV: provisional / sealed-operator — Devourer mythic register too intense for public
CL-006.resolution: dual-version structure confirmed; OV endorses operator version; CV restricts to Archive Grade / trained practitioners

bind_osr_rationale: OV order accepted: namespace collision safety (007) before R1-G semantic expansion (006)

regimes.name: Sacrificial Transfer
regimes.canon_condition: Burden Ledger mandatory. Wrong Door mandatory.

regimes.name: Tragic Convergence
regimes.note: OV +7. Closest to canon after SAC.
regimes.canon_condition: R1 availability test. P4 witness framing. Repair-tested terminal criteria before canon.
regimes.primary_risk: Collapse declared final before repair tested.

regimes.name: Covenant Coherence
regimes.canon_condition: Living-terms check. Context Drift Check. NOT auto-assigned from stable ANUBIS pass.

regimes.name: Iterative Pilgrimage
regimes.canon_condition: Delta-per-cycle metric. R1-G0 stop rule applies.
regimes.primary_risk: Repetition called practice, no behavioral delta.

regimes.name: Initiatory Spiral
regimes.canon_condition: Agency Gate: agency remains, support exists, challenge proportionate, capacity increasing.
regimes.primary_risk: Harm reframed as necessary growth without agency.

regimes.name: Exilic Wandering
regimes.canon_condition: Portable-continuity markers. Homecoming-condition test. R-reroute and R-refusal relevant.
regimes.primary_risk: Forced return before homecoming conditions exist.

regimes.name: Revelatory Recognition
regimes.canon_condition: New Signal Rule. Before/after evidence split. Anti-retroactive-agency rule.
regimes.primary_risk: Revelation used to retroactively rewrite agency.

regimes.name: Martyr-Witness
regimes.note: OV -5; closer to misuse risk in clinical work.
regimes.canon_condition: REGFW-006 mandatory hard-bind. Suffering is not evidence.

regimes.name: Active Witness / Tracking
regimes.ellari_decision: Required: CV=provisional(76) vs OV=quarantine(74). Average exactly on threshold.
regimes.rename_candidate: Active Witness with Action Threshold (both CV and OV)
regimes.primary_risk: Tracking used to defer action indefinitely.

regimes.name: Dharmic Alignment
regimes.ellari_decision: Required: CV=quarantine(71) vs OV=provisional(75). Average 73 = quarantine.
regimes.rename_mandatory: Role-Capacity Alignment (operator). 'Is this mine to carry?' (public).
regimes.primary_risk: Alignment used to justify indefinite demand.

regimes.name: Psychic Saturation
regimes.note: OV -7 from CV; may need deeper revision than initially assessed.
regimes.revision_required: Measurable capacity threshold. Downshift protocol. Recovery state.

regimes.name: Catalytic Disruption
regimes.split_proposal: CAT-D / CAT-R / CAT-F (Compiler V) — each subtype requires independent scoring
regimes.rename_candidate: Catalytic Rupture (OV) only if Harm Ledger mandatory
regimes.primary_risk: Disruption sanctified regardless of harm or consent.
